title: Raymond James (RJF) Q1 Earnings Top on Solid NII, Provisions Up
text: Higher NII, fall in expenses and past acquisitions support Raymond James' (RJF) fiscal Q1 earnings, while dismal IB performance and rise in provisions are undermining factors.

title: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates
text: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.62% and 3.02%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
